controls.title: Windows Server must have audit policy enabled for logon events
controls.description: Without generating audit records specific to security needs, it would be difficult to investigate incidents.
controls.checkText: Open gpedit.msc. Verify 'Audit Logon' is set to include 'Success and Failure'.
controls.fixText: Configure 'Audit Logon' to include 'Success and Failure'.

azureImplementation.Configuration: Enable diagnostic settings for Windows Security logs.
azureImplementation.Policy: Audit Windows audit policies
azureImplementation.Automation: Use Azure Automation DSC.

controls.title: Windows Server must enforce password complexity requirements
controls.description: Complex passwords increase time and resources required to compromise them.
controls.checkText: Verify 'Password must meet complexity requirements' is 'Enabled'.
controls.fixText: Set 'Password must meet complexity requirements' to 'Enabled'.

azureImplementation.Configuration: Configure password policies.
azureImplementation.Policy: Audit password policy settings
azureImplementation.Automation: Use Conditional Access policies.
